since_last: 72% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.97%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 72% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -4.06% · Gold -3.01% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 72% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.97%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.97%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.30%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +12.86%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +12.86%, LSCC +10.97%, SMCI +10.94%, INTC +10.32%, MU +9.48%. Laggards: INOD -7.14%, SPCX -5.08%, IBM -4.65%, WDAY -3.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.08% at $182.08
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
